text:
Created attachment 224110
the attachment contains the addition to the ports tree.

pkcs11-tools is a toolkit containing a bunch of small utilities to perform key management tasks on cryptographic tokens implementing a PKCS#11 interface. It features a number of commands similar to the unix CLI utilities, such as ls, mv, rm, od, and more. It also has specific commands to generate keys, generate CSRs, import certificates and other files, in a fashion compatible with most implementations, including both IBM and Oracle JVMs.
